scene.message: Kandori: Is the calibration{nl} complete, Dr. Nikolai?{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: You're not getting{nl} away, old man!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: The jig is up,{nl} Kandori!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Don't you run!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Wh-wh-wh-wh-what?!{nl} What is that?!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: W-What's going on?!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Kyaaah!{nl} Wh-what?!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Kyah?! What?!{waitkey}{ret}
Kandori's voice: Nikolai,{nl} you!! You played me!!{waitkey}{ret}
Kandori: You brat!!{nl} Stop the system!!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Old man!{nl} Don't be reckless...{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: This is seriously bad!{nl} {ctl0f:1}, do something!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Sonoda? How do{nl} you know that?!{waitkey}{ret}
Kandori's voice: AGGGHHH!{nl} Hurry and stop it!!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: No no no!{nl} It won't stop?!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Th-things seem like{nl} they're getting worse...{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Hey, what did{nl} you do?!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Kyah!{nl} Wh-what is this?!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: !!{nl} You!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Wha?!{nl} What is this?!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Dammit?!{nl} Kandori!!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Whooaaah!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: I can't take{nl} this anymore!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: No!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Come on, {ctl0f:1}!{nl} Do something already!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: The red button{nl} can save him!{waitkey}{ret}
